sections.paragraph:
once שָׁלֵיו Job 21:23, and שְׁלֵיו Jer 49:31, m. שְׁלֵוָה, f. pl. constr. שַׁלְוֵי (from the root שָׁלָה No. I).-

(1) safe, secure, 1Ch 4:40 especially living tranquilly, securely, Job 16:12 Psa 73:12. Neutr. security, Job 20:20.

(2) in a bad sense, secure, at ease, careless, compare שַׁאֲנָן No. 2, Eze 23:42.
